app_info.subtitle: Create and improve charts
app_info.description: Semiotic helps users select appropriate charts, generate verified chart previews, improve existing chart configurations, explain charts for non-visual readers, audit chart quality and accessibility, and inspect chart prop schemas.

justifications.read_only_justification: Selects, validates, diagnoses, and renders a chart from the supplied data without persisting or changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Produces an in-chat chart preview and does not publish content or change any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or otherwise irreversibly change anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Analyzes the supplied chart configuration and returns diagnostics, repairs, and variants without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns improvement guidance only and does not publish or update an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or otherwise irreversibly change anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Derives a textual description, communicative intent, and navigation structure from the supplied chart data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns an in-chat explanation and does not publish or update an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or otherwise irreversibly change anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Runs chart-quality, accessibility, and mobile checks on supplied configuration and returns findings without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns audit results only and does not publish or update an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or otherwise irreversibly change anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns canonical chart-prop schema guidance without changing the schema or any user data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns local schema guidance and does not publish or update an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or otherwise irreversibly change anything.

test_cases.description: Create a verified trend chart from a small dataset.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a chart showing monthly revenue from Jan to Jun and explain the trend.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a validated chart preview with a suitable chart choice and a concise summary of the trend.

test_cases.description: Improve a chart configuration that may not fit its data.
test_cases.user_prompt: Review my PieChart configuration for monthly sales data and suggest a better option if appropriate.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns diagnostics and practical repair or chart-variant recommendations for the supplied configuration.

test_cases.description: Explain a chart for a non-visual reader.
test_cases.user_prompt: Explain this LineChart's key trend and structure so a screen-reader user can understand it.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a text-based chart description, its communicative intent, and navigable data structure.

test_cases.description: Audit a mobile chart for accessibility and design risks.
test_cases.user_prompt: Audit my Scatterplot for accessibility and mobile-display issues at a 390-pixel viewport.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns prioritized quality, accessibility, and mobile findings for the supplied chart configuration.

test_cases.description: Look up configuration guidance for a requested chart type.
test_cases.user_prompt: What props do I need to configure a Semiotic BarChart?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns canonical prop-schema guidance for the requested chart component.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke for general calendar questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar management is outside its chart workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke to publish a social-media post.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Post an announcement about our quarterly results to LinkedIn.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot publish content or manage social-media accounts.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke for general image editing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Remove the background from this product photo.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because general photo editing is outside its supported visualization workflows.
